description: Azure Status RSS feed reports a region-wide degradation in East US affecting App Service. Phase E enrichment publishes an enrichment.azure.status.degraded signal → cognition graph is tagged with upstream-degraded:eastus for 30 minutes. NO workflow trigger — workers triaging downstream incidents during the window cite the upstream condition rather than chase ghosts.

payload.title: Region East US — App Service degraded
payload.summary: We are aware of an issue affecting some App Service customers in East US. Engineers are investigating.

expectedOutcomes: cognition graph picks up upstream-degraded:eastus with 30-minute TTL
audit ring records cognition.tag.upstream-degraded entry attributed to enrichment:azure-status
